/usr/bin/cc  -O3 -march=native -Wall -Wextra -fPIC  -Wl,--disable-new-dtags -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/test_profiler.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/test_profiler.dir/tests/test_profiler.c.o -o test_profiler  -Wl,-rpath,/home/tim/venvs/llm/lib/python3.12/site-packages/scipy.libs:/home/tim/Projects/LLM/research/runtime/native/build_current libaria_native_runtime.so -lm /home/tim/venvs/llm/lib/python3.12/site-packages/scipy.libs/libscipy_openblas-b75cc656.so /usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/13/libgomp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpthread.a
